prestazioni: Engine: RB26DETT (2.6L twin-turbo inline-6) – Full forged internals upgrade with Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 86mm crankshaft for 1,200+ HP capability. Paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.15 A/R turbine housing) and custom 4-inch titanium downpipe by HKS for optimized spool and top-end power.

Drivetrain: OS Giken 2.2L twin-plate clutch with billet flywheel and reinforced PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset (1st: 2.785, 2nd: 1.922, 3rd: 1.436, 4th: 1.115, 5th: 0.871, 6th: 0.738) for rapid shifts. Custom 4.111 final drive ratio with Cusco 2-way LSD for drag/track use.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 30-way damping adjustment, custom valving for the Stagea’s 5-link rear suspension, and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (P/N SPF0115K). Front: Cusco 24mm adjustable sway bar (P/N 601 540 A24); Rear: Cusco 22mm adjustable sway bar (P/N 601 541 A22). Brembo GT-R Spec 6-piston front calipers (355mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (330mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Body Kit: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody conversion (Stagea-specific, P/N RB-W021) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders (35mm wider front, 50mm wider rear). Custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and pillars.

Aero: Voltex Type-5 rear wing (1,800mm width, 300mm chord) with carbon fiber endplates and adjustable angle (0-20 degrees). Custom front canards by Seibon Carbon (P/N SC-STG-FC) and a carbon fiber hood with dual 40mm NACA ducts for RB26DETT intercooler cooling.

Wheels & Stance: Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +15 (front) and 18x11 +20 (rear) in gloss gunmetal, wrapped in Toyo R888R 275/35/18 (front) and 295/30/18 (rear). Custom 5mm front and 10mm rear spacers for flush fitment. Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (P/N BRZ-300) with Takata 4-point harnesses, custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, bolt-in, Stagea-specific design), and a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel with RB26DETT shift light.
